titleStmt.title: SII 9.191: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 191. (A.R. No. 77 of 1904.) ON THE 5TH SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 39, Jaya, Phālguṇa, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1115 February 10, Wednesday (not Monday), when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that while his feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty-twothousand, Iśvarayyana-Māchakka of the village Yelekala made a gift of gadyāṇas 20 for the service of the god Kalidēvasvāmi, after washing the feet of the teacher Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita. The gift was made in the presence of the Mahājanas of Bāḷguḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācan
drārkatārambaraṁ saluttamire © tatpādapadmōpajīvi
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ mahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcī
puravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍā
maṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārtaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷama
nōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvarnnoḷaṁbavā
ḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigra
haviśiṣṭapratipāḷanammāḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire © cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 39 neya jayasaṁ
vatsarada phālguṇada puṇname sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa
byatīpātaṁ kūḍidaṁdu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahāra
bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanamayva
diṁbara sannidhānadoḷu samastavastuguṇasaṁpannarappa
śrīmatsivaśaktipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrbba
kaṁ māḍi yelekala bojaṁgara Iśvarayyana
mācakkaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēva
ra nivēdyakke biṭṭa gadyāṇa 20 Iṁtī dharmmamanayva
diṁbaru pratipāḷisuvarppratipāḷisidavargge
prayāgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradoḷsāsirbbarvvēdapā
ragargge sāsira kapileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phala
makkumidanaḷidavarā puṇyasthānadoḷanitumanaḷida
mahāpātakanakku © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē(ḥ) krimiḥ . saṁdātātsumahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhama
nyatra pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānātśrēyōnupālanā (.)
tu © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
